info.name: Email Delivery Fix Tests - FINAL CORRECTED
info.description: Complete test suite for email delivery fix

item.name: 1️⃣ SUCCESS PATH - Send Email with Valid Recipient

body.raw:
{
  "eventId": "{{eventId}}",
  "recipientId": "{{recipientId}}",
  "recipientEmail": "user@fashionbrand.com",
  "eventType": "RESTOCK_ALERT",
  "severity": "HIGH",
  "title": "✅ SUCCESS TEST: Restock Required",
  "message": "Popular item is running low on inventory",
  "sourceService": "catalog-service",
  "productId": "{{productId}}",
  "warehouseId": "{{warehouseId}}",
  "correlationId": "{{correlationId}}"
}

{
  "eventId": "{{eventId}}",
  "recipientId": "{{recipientId}}",
  "eventType": "MARKDOWN_ALERT",
  "severity": "MEDIUM",
  "title": "❌ FAILURE TEST: Missing Recipient Email",
  "message": "This event has no recipientEmail - should trigger failure and retry",
  "sourceService": "ml-service",
  "productId": "{{productId}}",
  "warehouseId": "{{warehouseId}}",
  "correlationId": "{{correlationId}}"
}

{
  "eventId": "{{eventId}}",
  "recipientId": "{{recipientId}}",
  "recipientEmail": "",
  "eventType": "CLEARANCE_ALERT",
  "severity": "LOW",
  "title": "❌ FAILURE TEST: Empty Email String",
  "message": "This event has empty recipientEmail - should trigger failure and retry",
  "sourceService": "sales-service",
  "productId": "{{productId}}",
  "warehouseId": "{{warehouseId}}",
  "correlationId": "{{correlationId}}"
}

item.name: 5️⃣ Cleanup - Delete All Emails from MailHog
